title: Revolve Group Inc (RVLV) Q3 2024 Earnings Summary
text: Revolve Group reported strong top-line growth in Q3 2024. Net Sales: $283 million, an increase of 10% year over year, with the REVOLVE segment performing particularly well at 12% growth. However, the FWRD segment remained nearly flat. International operations drove impressive results, with International Net Sales increased 20% year over year. The company generated $11 million in net income, representing meaningful improvement from the prior year's $3 million. Management achieved significant operational leverage. Adjusted EBITDA: $18 million, an increase of 85% year over year, reflecting better cost management despite gross margin headwinds. Key efficiency improvements included reduced fulfillment costs at 3.3% of sales and substantially lower marketing spend relative to revenue at 14% of net sales. Inventory management remains problematic. The company held Inventory: $240 million, an increase of 18% year over year, which outpaced sales growth and signals potential overstock concerns. Gross margin contracted by 56 basis points, primarily due to deeper discounting. Management acknowledged continued pressure on gross margin in the fourth quarter due to markdowns and freight costs. The company maintains a long-term EBITDA margin target of 14% but faces near-term profitability constraints from inventory normalization efforts.
